name: Flux Rifle
description: Laser Rifle with Corpus safe-guards removed.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Laser Rifle with Corpus safe-guards removed.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a UI error in the Arsenal when equipping the Flux Overdrive Mod on the Tenet Flux Rifle.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tenet Flux Rifle beam FX breaking if the player camera is moved while aiming by strafing, moving, etc.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Flux Rifle beam’s impact sounds.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with the Flux Rifle’s FX.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Fulmin (only when reduced to below 10 rounds on Semi-Auto firing mode), Flux Rifle, Kitguns with the 'Gaze' Chamber type and Pax Charge Arcane, Imperator/Vandal, Cycron, and Larkspur not recharging correctly.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed hearing Headshot sounds when firing the Flux Rifle.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes: Flux Rifle (original material and the Shock Camo Skin)

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked Flux Rifle controller rumble on recharge.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: The Flux Rifle has a new battery charge up and fully charged sound to go with it’s beam rework!

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Flux Rifle’s material not using the correct energy color.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes: Flux Rifle now has improved damage and proc rate.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Flux Rifle adjustments to not be pure Slash damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.3.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fix for Flux Rifle and Ignis not being able to damage reactor cores or Orokin death orbs.
The above fix also fixes not being able to pop Saryn's venom orbs with Flux Rifle & Ignis.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.4: Double Affinity Weekend!
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Flux Rifle not being able to damage ragolled enemies on client.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Smaller radius on impact sounds for the Flux Rifle.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Flux Rifle – damage and fire rate buff.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ignis and Flux Rifle showing a clip size of 1.$ in the arsenal

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Increased fire distance on the Flux Rifle.
